presets.name: sd15_txt2img
presets.notes: Default SD 1.5 text-to-image preset for portrait-oriented output.

presets.name: sd15_img2img
presets.notes: Image refinement preset. Denoise 0.55 preserves roughly half the source structure.

presets.name: sd15_openpose_portrait
presets.notes: OpenPose-guided portrait generation. Requires controlnet_openpose and pose map.

presets.name: sd15_controlnet_depth
presets.notes: Depth-guided scene composition. Requires controlnet_depth and depth map.

presets.name: sd15_reference_lock
presets.notes: Reference-conditioned generation via IPAdapter. Requires ipadapter model.
